summary: Frontend testing completed for Advanced Analytics (Gelişmiş Analitik) page filters and export functionality. All 11 requested features are working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - minor issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Filter section visible with Region/City/Store/Date filters - PASSED
Region dropdown shows Turkish regions (Marmara, Ege, Akdeniz, İç Anadolu, Karadeniz, Doğu Anadolu, Güneydoğu Anadolu) - PASSED
City dropdown shows cities (İstanbul when Marmara selected) - PASSED
Store dropdown shows Forum Kadikoy and Test Mağaza 2 - PASSED
Reset filters button (Sıfırla) clears all filters - PASSED
Export dropdown shows Excel/PDF/JSON options - PASSED
Data updates when filter changes (visitor count changes with filters) - PASSED
Active filters badge shows selected filters (Marmara, Forum Kadikoy badges) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warnings about chart dimensions - charts render correctly but warnings appear during initial load
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Analytics page filters and export functionality fully tested. All filters (Region, City, Store, Date, Period) work correctly. Export dropdown has Excel, PDF, JSON options - JSON export verified to download correctly. Active filters badge appears when filters are selected and disappears when reset. Data updates dynamically when filters change.

features_verified.filter_section: Visible with Filtreler: label and all filter dropdowns
features_verified.region_dropdown: Shows 7 Turkish regions + Tüm Bölgeler option
features_verified.city_dropdown: Shows cities filtered by selected region
features_verified.store_dropdown: Shows Forum Kadikoy and Test Mağaza 2
features_verified.export_dropdown: Excel (.xlsx), PDF, JSON options with data-testid attributes
features_verified.json_export: Downloads file with correct data structure
features_verified.data_updates: Stats change when filters are applied
features_verified.active_filters_badge: Shows colored badges for selected filters

mocked_api_note: Analytics API returns sample data for demo purposes
